entry.title: your landlord's lawyer wrote your lease. you signed it in 10 minutes. and then wondered why you lost your deposit. 😮‍💨 nobody taught you or your roomies how to read these things and landlords are BANKING 💸 on that. so I made something — a free PDF Space
entry.content: your landlord's lawyer wrote your lease. you signed it in 10 minutes. and then wondered why you lost your deposit. 😮‍💨 nobody taught you or your roomies how to read these things and landlords are BANKING 💸 on that. so I made something — a free PDF Space
